'''Cardacs''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
An experienced [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], Cardacs served in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] before transferring to the [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']]. His first mission with [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] [[Red Two/Legends|Red Two]],<ref name="XW" /> was to [[Rescue from Stars' End|rescue]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] prisoners, including his friend [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Samuel Raider]], who had escaped on the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Genue]]'' from the [[Stars' End/Legends|Star's End]] penal colony at [[Mytus VII/Legends|Mytus VII]]. Although the mission was successful, Cardacs was killed in action when his [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]]<ref name="A/R-22">Although both the game [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] and the [[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide|official strategy guide]] referred to the ship as an A-wing, the time period of the game's events would make it the R-22 Spearhead, the A-wing's predecessor.</ref> was destroyed by [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] from the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']]. Although Captain [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], Cardacs' flight leader, had known him for only minutes, Cardacs was the first [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmate]] he had lost, and the guilt of his [[Death/Legends|death]] weighed heavily on Farlander. Cardacs' friend Raider initially held Farlander responsible for his death, but later realized that there was nothing he could have done.<ref name="XWOSG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cardacs is the wingman (the A-wing that escorts the player) in ToD II: Op I: 'Rescue at the Stars' End' of [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']], although he is not mentioned in the game's narrative. It's indeed very difficult, if not impossible, to save him from the incoming TIEs, and his loss is canonized in the strategy guide.<ref name="XWOSG" /><ref name="XW" />
